title: Create: New Age Retexture
description: New Create like textures for Create: New Age mod by antarcticgardens team.
body:
**New models and textures for Create addon-mod - Create: New Age.
This resource pack replaces old mod textures and models with new ones, which are more compatible with Create itself.**

All textures and models have been redrawn: items, motors, magnets, heat and atomic related blocks and etc.
The new style is aimed at more interaction with **Create** default textures and models.

The texture pack is suitable for those who want to play with a good mod in a new guise and for **Create** textures lovers.
Examples of modified textures can be found in the images tab.

[Curseforge Create: New Age mod page.   ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-new-age)

Also check out the data pack that goes well with these textures.

[Modrinth Create: New Age Recrafting](https://modrinth.com/datapack/create-new-age-recrafting)

[Curseforge Create: New Age Recrafting](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/create-new-age-recrafting)

_!not for early versions of the mod there may be problems with textures set at your own risk!_
